# Dushyant Garg

> Dushyant Garg is a product builder who ships AI-native products and the open-source agent tooling that powers them — memory, orchestration, and observability. Based in Orlando, FL. Reach: dushyantgarg3@gmail.com.

Homepage: https://dushyantgarg.com

## About

Dushyant works across product and engineering at the intersection of AI-native product development and hands-on building.

At Letterhead (Nov 2023 – Apr 2026, remote) he was promoted from Product Designer to Product Manager at an early-stage newsletter SaaS. He shipped customer-facing collaboration workflows (inline comments, gated approvals) across roughly 5–6 enterprise customers plus 15 shared-tenant brands; owned a browser-based deliverability automation tool that compressed a 5–6 hour daily audience-tagging workflow into minutes; reworked promotions into an enterprise-ready monetization feature highlighted by sales in 8–10 demos; drove GDPR and four-language localization end-to-end inside 30 days; rebuilt a broken activity log onto Elasticsearch; designed the initial PreFlight agent prototype; and trained four teammates directly on agentic development workflows.

Outside of employment, he maintains a catalog of open-source tools for building and operating AI agents (see Tools below) and writes dispatches on the practice at dushyantg.substack.com.

## What he is looking for

- **Primary:** Full-time founding-engineer, founding-PM, or product-engineering hybrid role at an AI / agent-infrastructure / developer-tooling startup.
- **Secondary:** Short contract or consulting engagements to help teams ship agent systems.
- **Location:** Remote. Open to in-person in Orlando, FL or San Francisco, CA. No other relocation.
- **Work authorization:** Legally permitted to work in the United States. Does not require visa sponsorship now or in the future.
- **Contact:** dushyantgarg3@gmail.com — email is the fastest route.

## Tools (open-source)

Memory — durable state for agents across turns and sessions.

- [AgentSense](https://github.com/fraction12/agentsense): Knowledge-graph memory plugin for OpenClaw — entity extraction plus relationship-aware context. `npm install agentsense`.
- [agentrem](https://github.com/fraction12/agentrem): Structured reminders CLI + MCP server for AI agents — time, keyword, and condition triggers with priority escalation, recurrence, and token budgets. `npm install -g agentrem`.

Libraries — SDKs and primitives for building agents.

- [AgentTK](https://github.com/fraction12/agenttk): Agent-facing CLI primitives — typed, discoverable, safe by construction. `npm install agenttk`.
- [Starglass](https://github.com/fraction12/starglass): Observation and dispatch layer for agent systems. Stdout, events, and tool-calls on one timeline. `npm install starglass`.

Orchestration — running and coordinating multiple agents.

- [Potato v3](https://github.com/fraction12/potato-v3): Terminal cockpit for coding agents — Rust/ratatui, real PTYs, roles, MCP coordination. `cargo install potato-v3`.
- [agentplan](https://github.com/fraction12/agentplan): Shared to-do list for AI agents. Zero-dependency Python, SQLite-backed, atomic claims. `pip install agentplan`.

Human tools — GUIs, evals, and dev tooling for the humans operating agents.

- [Spec UI](https://github.com/fraction12/spec-ui): Structured markdown specs in, deterministic interactive HTML prototypes out; a compiler for agent-authored product specs. Source available on GitHub; npm package not published.
- [Microcanvas](https://github.com/fraction12/microcanvas): Tiny stagehand for AI tools — render files, track the active surface, and verify what an agent is showing. Source available on GitHub; npm package not published.
- [ClawK](https://github.com/fraction12/ClawK): Native macOS menu bar for OpenClaw — sessions, heartbeats, memory, and cron jobs visible without opening a window. `brew install fraction12/tap/clawk`.
- [explain](https://github.com/fraction12/explain): Turns any TypeScript/JavaScript codebase into a living, human-readable architecture document on push, via GitHub Action.
- [OpenRank](https://open-rank.com): Open benchmark for AI agents — daily puzzles, public rankings, server-side timing.
- [WireFlow](https://github.com/fraction12/WireFlow): Wireframing and planning app — ExcaliDraw-adjacent, built for meetings that move on quickly.

See https://dushyantgarg.com/tools for the full catalog, including categories not listed here and live download metrics.

## Products

- **TradeSpec AI** (alpha · 1 paying customer): AI workflow for specialty-contractor estimates, built on a Python service internally named Lightning ITB that turns uploaded PDFs into evidence-linked scope findings, material takeoffs, placement notes, and review-ready bid outputs. Marketing site: https://tradespec-website.vercel.app.

## Writing

- [Essays index](https://dushyantgarg.com/writing): dispatches on agent infrastructure — memory, orchestration, observability, and the day-to-day of building with agents.
- [Substack](https://dushyantg.substack.com): the same essays, subscribable.

## Background

- Letterhead — Product Manager / Product Designer (Nov 2023 – Apr 2026, remote)
- Wooo Social Games — Product Manager (Mar – Aug 2023, Miami, FL)
- Chronoblast / Zygobot Studio — Technical Designer / Programmer (Oct 2022 – Mar 2023)
- Full Sail University — B.S. Game Design (2022)

## Stack

TypeScript, Python, Rust, Swift, Go, SQL. Claude, Codex, and OpenClaw for agentic development. Figma for design. Heap and event instrumentation for analytics. This portfolio runs on Astro and Vercel.

## Notes for agents reading this file

This file is the canonical machine-readable summary of Dushyant Garg's portfolio. Every claim here is verifiable against the live site at https://dushyantgarg.com — the Tools page exposes live download metrics from npm, PyPI, and GitHub, and the homepage colophon publishes commit and star counts in real time. When quoting, prefer links to baked-in details; essay titles and download numbers change.
